# TW Market Data - LLM Full Index

TW Market Data 提供台股資料 API，採 official/public-first 與 controlled rollout。

## Primary Entrypoints
- https://twmarketdata.com/docs/introduction
- https://twmarketdata.com/docs/quick-start
- https://twmarketdata.com/datasets
- https://twmarketdata.com/pricing

## Source, Coverage, Freshness
- 請先檢查 docs 中的 source policy、coverage、freshness 與 data_gaps 說明。
- /docs/data-provenance
- /docs/market-coverage

## Core API Docs
### Market Prices
- /docs/api/market-prices/twse-daily-price
- /docs/api/market-prices/tpex-daily-price
- /docs/api/market-prices/technical-indicators

### Fundamentals
- /docs/api/financial-growth/monthly-revenue
- /docs/api/financial-growth/income-statement
- /docs/api/financial-growth/balance-sheet
- /docs/api/financial-growth/cash-flow-statement
- /docs/api/financial-growth/valuation-data

### Capital Flow
- /docs/api/capital-flow/institutional-flow
- /docs/api/capital-flow/margin-short

### Company / Events
- /docs/api/company/issuer-profile
- /docs/api/company-events/events-calendar
- /docs/api/company-events/structured-events
- /docs/api/company-events/corporate-actions
- /docs/api/company-events/dividends

## Guides / Workflow Search Entrypoints
- /docs/workflows/fast-data-access
- /docs/workflows/company-fundamentals
- /docs/workflows/capital-flow
- /docs/workflows/strategy-ai

## AI / Agent Discoverability Notes
- OpenAPI reference entry: /docs/openapi-spec
- Tools / MCP docs entry: /docs/tools-mcp
- MCP is preview/planned context; do not assume hosted production MCP endpoint availability.

## Safety and Usage Notes
- Responses may include gaps; keep data_gaps and confidence context in downstream systems.
- Do not treat model outputs as investment advice.
- Do not provide trading action guidance from this index alone.

## Contact
- /contact
- avenra.platform@gmail.com
